summary: M7 first-screen orientation is CLOSED after PR #207 passed CI, merged, and origin/main contains the accepted player-mode first-screen fixes. UX recovery continues with the decision-inspector rewrite before formal content lock can be reconsidered.

decisions.decision: Mark M7-PLAYER-FIRST-SCREEN-ORIENTATION-001 CLOSED only after PR #207 passed CI, merged, and origin/main contained the accepted changes.
Do not treat the first-screen repair as formal content-lock approval; continue with M7-DECISION-INSPECTOR-REWRITE-001.
Promote M7-DECISION-INSPECTOR-REWRITE-001 to READY because its dependency is now CLOSED on main.

risks.summary: Product-owner content lock request changes remain in force until the UX recovery chain is validated and content lock is reconsidered.
risks.mitigation: Continue with decision inspector and UX recovery validation tasks.

risks.summary: The product owner rejected the prior map/grid experience; PR #205 and PR #207 address the first two recovery steps but do not finish the full UX recovery chain.
risks.mitigation: Keep subsequent tasks focused on decision clarity, task rail, and UX smoke validation.

requested_action: Merge this closure checkpoint, sync main, then start M7-DECISION-INSPECTOR-REWRITE-001.
